commit_message:
[pwm, dv] Add DV for pwm_smoke test (Standard mode) [pwm, dv] Add DV for pwm_smoke test (Standard mode) This PR consists of the baseline DV for the smoke test (V1) of PWM. It has been verified with RTL D1 which was submitted in PR #6786 by [@Muqing-Liu](https://github.com/Muqing-Liu/opentitan)

  - Instantiate pwm_monitor, pwm_item, pwm_if in env (remove pwm_agent)
  - Add smoke test to verify the Standard mode of PWM IP
    (Blinking and Heartbeat modes are WiP)

Signed-off-by: Tung Hoang

examples.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,8 @@ module pwm_bind;
   bind pwm pwm_csr_assert_fpv pwm_csr_assert (
     .clk_i,
     .rst_ni,
-    .h2d    (tl_i),
-    .d2h    (tl_o)
+    .h2d  (tl_i),
+    .d2h  (tl_o)
   );
+
 endmodule
